Description.value: Adds a craftable beacon block. When placed, it auto-registers a NavObject visible on map and compass, with up/down arrows on the compass and a live altitude-difference label (Beacon ▲5m / ▼12m) on the on-screen HUD. Solves vanilla map markers' lack of vertical (Y axis) information for deep mines, multi-floor POIs, and tall structures. Requires HarmonyX (0_TFP_Harmony). EAC must be off.
